name: NextClaw App Runtime
summary: Create, preview, validate, publish, install, and run NextClaw Apps with lightweight source-first distribution, without needing to understand napp, WASI, Wasmtime, JCO, npm, registry, or marketplace details.

summaryI18n.en: Create, preview, validate, publish, install, and run NextClaw Apps with lightweight source-first distribution, without needing to understand napp, WASI, Wasmtime, JCO, npm, registry, or marketplace details.
summaryI18n.zh: 创建、预览、校验、发布、安装和运行 NextClaw Apps，并默认使用轻量 source-first 分发；用户不需要理解 napp、WASI、Wasmtime、JCO、npm、registry 或 marketplace 细节。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to build, publish, install, or use a NextClaw App through @nextclaw/app-runtime. The skill owns the ordinary-user journey: readiness checks with `napp doctor`, choosing between `ts-http` and `ts-http-lite`, automated `napp build --install`, source-first `napp validate-publish` and `napp publish`, local preview links, registry install flows that materialize source distributions locally, explicit permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to build, publish, install, or use a NextClaw App through @nextclaw/app-runtime. The skill owns the ordinary-user journey: readiness checks with `napp doctor`, choosing between `ts-http` and `ts-http-lite`, automated `napp build --install`, source-first `napp validate-publish` and `napp publish`, local preview links, registry install flows that materialize source distributions locally, explicit permission mapping, and first-run troubleshooting.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望通过 @nextclaw/app-runtime 构建、发布、安装或使用 NextClaw App 时使用此技能。它负责普通用户旅程：通过 `napp doctor` 检查环境、在 `ts-http` 与 `ts-http-lite` 之间做选择、自动 `napp build --install`、默认执行 source-first 的 `napp validate-publish` 与 `napp publish`、返回本地预览链接、从 registry 安装后本地物化 source 分发包、显式权限映射和首轮排障。

author: NextClaw
